{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323022030732BF973BC53F7A9414E"}"},"total":367},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429557938774917950","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的还不错，国家挺清晰的，看你说没有大纲，但是那个乐安天命。最后组在一块儿已经很好了。加油吧！网友们也不要说作者了，他也在为他的生活而拼搏。我们只能祝福它，祝他越来越好，以后再小说界能写出更好的小说。[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729833961,"group_id":"7344165266932108312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿读天下最多的书，越行天下最长的路","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5PpZOucLRltcwxGFxXfA04=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/99be3a52926e44b3ac57a5156d7bb1c5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795342&x-signature=it35ZOfeM8HxcAs3AGt6oltbJ%2BM%3D","user_id":"444634085472151","user_name":"朽暮白首"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"444634085472151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7344165266932108312","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+学霸校花+单女主+无系统+日常狗粮文】
当了一辈子舔狗，躺在重症病房里的苏命幡然醒悟。
‘我们还小，要慢慢来’这种鬼话，他居然从高中信到大学毕业！
重生之后，他坚决不再当舔狗，一心只想好好学习。
为了自己，为了父母，为了弥补曾经的遗憾。
女人会欺骗你，但数学不会。
不会就是不会！
苏命没有想到，学习上最大的拦路虎，
居然是隔壁班的学霸校花！
初次见面，他就被喝醉的学霸校花强吻。
他将醉酒的学霸校花带回家，
夜里又被对方强行搂着睡觉
……
社恐的学霸校花，为什么撩起自己来如此主动？
苏命：“这道物理题怎么做啊？”
牧幼安：“嘻嘻，你猜……”
苏命：“这道化学题怎么做啊？”
牧幼安：“陪我吃饭，我就告诉你。”
苏命：“这道数学题怎么做啊？”
牧幼安：“你亲我一下，我就告诉你。”
苏命：“能不能不要动手动脚，会影响我的做题速度！”
苏命：“等等，你穿成这样是什么意思？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99ece602768a8c0d1f08008c672337a7","author":"喜欢铜臭的康先生","author_id":"","book_id":"7344165266932108312","book_name":"开局被校花强吻，她竟让我老实点","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3630人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7345255324594487832","read_count":"3630","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"718636"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"334","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,学霸,校花,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b6cd361fe9789581a8785c63cecce40d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387630&x-signature=73fN8sNtIU9uEbLGZR4zEtkpajs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2005961413762759","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15
